common.callBeforeVisit: A quick call before you go helps confirm they can still welcome you — details sometimes change.
common.ngoTimingNote: Hours can shift on festival days and Sundays — worth a gentle check.
common.noResults: We haven’t found a match nearby yet. Try another search or browse categories — we’re glad you’re here.
common.tryArea: Try a different area or search word, or browse categories at your pace.
common.enableLocationHint: If you turn on location, we can show distances — only on your phone, and only if you’re comfortable.
common.mapOfflineBody: The full address is below whenever you need it. Connect when you can for the map view.
common.mentalHealthBanner: If you’re struggling, you deserve support. Someone is ready to listen — try a helpline below.
common.workWarning: If a job asks for money before you start, pause — it may not be genuine. Check with someone you trust if you can.

a11y.openPlace: Opens details, calling, directions, and a way to save this place.
a11y.openCategory: Opens a list of places that may help in this category.
a11y.searchHint: Type a name or area, then press search on the keyboard when you’re ready.
a11y.emergencyFabHint: Opens numbers for police, ambulance, and other urgent help.
a11y.openSearchScreen: Search all places by name or area.

onboarding.brandSubEn: Namma Madras — Chennai welcomes all who come
onboarding.introTa: உணவு, தங்குமிடம், மருத்துவம், வேலை, கற்றல் — அனைத்தும் இலவசமாக
onboarding.introEn: Food, shelter, medical, work, learning — all free, all in one place
onboarding.introHi: खाना, आश्रय, चिकित्सा, काम, शिक्षा — सब मुफ्त, एक जगह
onboarding.welcomeTitle: Help in Chennai, when you need it
onboarding.welcomeBody: Find free and low-cost food, shelter, health, work, and learning places. Works offline after you open the app once.
onboarding.langSimpleHeadline: Help us know your preferred language
onboarding.chooseLangHint: You can change this anytime in Settings.
onboarding.langSub: Change this anytime in Settings — it’s your choice.
onboarding.personaSub: We only use this to put the most relevant help first — not to build a profile. Change anytime in Settings.
onboarding.pCrisis: I need food or a safe place soon
onboarding.permIntro: Optional — skip if you want. We don't track you. Location stays on your phone.
onboarding.permFooterHint: You can change permissions anytime in your phone Settings or in this app’s Settings.
onboarding.locBody: If you’re comfortable sharing location, we can list nearer places first. It stays on your device — we only use it for distance, never uploaded.
onboarding.notifBody: Optional: we can let you know when new verified places are added. Needs internet — only if you’d like.

categoriesScreen.browseSub: Pick a category to see places. From Home, tap Search to find a name or area.
categoriesScreen.headerSub: Browse by type — pick a category to see places.

searchScreen.emptyHint: Type a place name, temple, or area — results appear as you type.
searchScreen.emptyHintInCategory: Type a name or area in {{category}} — results appear as you type.

home.sub: Free and low-cost help around you — works offline, made with care.
home.heroTagline:
Feeding the hungry is greater than the strength to endure the hunger.
— Tirukkural 225, īkai (Giving)
home.heroBrowseA11y: Opens every type of help we list. Food, shelter, health, and more are below.
home.heroSavedA11y: Opens places you saved with the heart.
home.heroSearchPlaceholder: Search by place name or area…
home.heroSearchHint: Opens search to find any listed place by name or area.
home.listToolbarTitle: Pick what to show, then sort
home.hygieneListToolbarTitle: Pick what to show, then sort
home.cardNoTimings: Hours not listed here — open the place for details
home.cardFrequencyWeekly: Not every day — see schedule above
home.cardFrequencyPeriodic: On select days — confirm before you go

quickFilter.openNowHint: Places likely serving or open when you arrive.

home.quickFilterEmpty: No places match this filter right now. Try another filter or show everything.
home.filterSortBarA11y: Show all places or only those open now, then sort. Scroll sideways for sort options.
home.listNoOpenBanner: Nothing is clearly open right now. The list below may still help — open a place for full timings.
home.templesPrasadamSub: Each temple shares meals in its own way — the place page has the kindest details to check.
home.otherMealsSub: NGO kitchens, Amma canteens, and neighbours feeding neighbours — offered with care across Chennai.

arrivalHint.likely: They’ll often still be serving when you get there.
arrivalHint.closing_soon: You might arrive close to closing — a quick call can help.
arrivalHint.late: They may have closed by the time you arrive — a call can save you a trip.
arrivalHint.before_open: You might be early for today’s window — timings on the place page can guide you.
arrivalHint.always_open: The space welcomes visits around the clock — meal times may still follow their own schedule.
arrivalHint.unknown: We don’t have full hours here — the place page is the gentlest next step.

receptionHall.toastShort: Tip: open Maps to find reception and marriage halls near you.
receptionHall.bannerCompact: Good day — reception halls often serve morning & evening.
receptionHall.bannerCompactSeason: Good day for halls — wedding season; many serve morning & evening.
receptionHall.bannerCompactAadi: Aadi month — fewer halls, but some still host. Morning or evening.
receptionHall.bannerA11y: Opens Maps to find nearby reception and marriage halls.

stay.heroTagline:
“Welcome guests with kindness — that is honest living.”
— Tirukkural 81, Virundhompal (Hospitality)
stay.quickFilterEmpty: No places match this filter right now. Try another filter or show everything.
stay.filterSortBarA11y: Filter by free stays or stays with a fee, then sort. Scroll sideways for sort options.
stay.coordinatorA11y: Overall coordinator for GCC night shelters. Tap phone to call.
stay.filterGenderA11y: Filter shelters by who can stay
stay.filterCategoryA11y: Filter by kind of shelter or stay
stay.filterBarA11y: Quick filters for shelters. Scroll sideways for more.
stay.realityCheck: Not sure which shelter to use? Call ahead — the coordinator can guide you.
stay.detailTicket: Valid train ticket required for railway retiring rooms — book via IRCTC when possible.
stay.detailHospital: For family attending patients at this hospital — not for general homeless shelter.

medical.heroTagline:
“Find the cause, then cure — then act aright.”
— Tirukkural 948, Maruthuvam (Medicine)
medical.sosSubtitle: Numbers are big on purpose — tap to call. Works offline after this screen loads.
medical.sosA11y: Emergency numbers and helplines. Tap a number to call.
medical.filterBarA11y: Filter healthcare places by type. Scroll sideways for more filters.

learn.heroTagline:
“The learned are the eyes of the world.”
— Tirukkural 391, Payiran (The Wealth of Learning)
learn.placesEmpty: No walk-in places match this filter. Try “All” or the guides above.

work.labourFilterBarA11y: Filter labour stands by type of work. Scroll sideways for more.
work.labourFilterEmpty: No labour stands match this filter right now. Try “All” or another work type.
work.noWebsiteHint: No website link here — check the address or ask at your ward office.
work.knowYourRights: Know your rights — TN minimum wages
work.directionsA11yHint: Opens maps with directions to this stand

emergency.heroTagline:
“Friendship is the heart’s warmth toward the friend.”
— Tirukkural 786, Natpu (Friendship)

hygiene.heroTagline:
“Cleanliness of body — dignity’s first step.”
— Tamil wisdom (shared with care)
hygiene.filterBarA11y: Filter hygiene places by type. Scroll sideways for more.
hygiene.quickFilterEmpty: No places match this filter right now. Try another type or show everything.
hygiene.toiletNoticePrefix: Find a free toilet in the list below — they are free to use. City helpline

place.notFoundHint: This link may be old, or the listing changed. Head back and open the place from the list or search.
place.feedbackHint: Opens your email — we read every message and fix listings when we can.
place.feedbackPlaceholder: Wrong hours, permanently closed, or anything we should correct…
place.feedbackEmpty: Add a short message describing what to fix.
place.feedbackTooLong: That message is a bit too long. Please shorten it and try again.

emergency.title: Emergency help
emergency.subtitle: Tap a number to call — works without internet

settings.title: Settings
settings.tamilNumeralsSub: Use Tamil numerals for distances and times when the app is in Tamil.
settings.linkEmergencySub: Police, ambulance, and helplines — works offline
settings.linkLocationSub: Open your phone’s settings to allow or deny location
settings.privacyRowSub: Short summary — no signup, data stays on device
settings.privacySheetBody: Language, saved places, and what you browse stay on this phone. The app doesn’t need an account and isn’t built to upload your personal choices for sign-in.

saved.title: Saved places
saved.empty: Nothing saved yet. When a place feels right, tap the heart — we’ll keep it here for you.
